name: Tanium REST
description: This app supports investigative and generic actions on Tanium

actions.name: List Processes
actions.description: List the running processes of the devices registered on the Tanium server

parameters.name: sensor
parameters.description: Sensor which will list all the processes

parameters.name: group_name
parameters.description: Computer group name of which the processes will be listed

parameters.name: timeout_seconds
parameters.description: The number of seconds before the question expires

actions.name: Parse Question
actions.description: Parses the supplied text into a valid Tanium query string

parameters.name: query_text
parameters.description: Query text to parse

actions.name: List Questions
actions.description: Retrieves either a history of the most recent questions or a list of saved questions

parameters.name: list_saved_questions
parameters.description: Retrieve Saved Questions

actions.name: Terminate Process
actions.description: Kill a running process of the devices registered on the Tanium server

parameters.name: action_name
parameters.description: Name of the action

parameters.name: action_group
parameters.description: Group of the action

parameters.name: package_name
parameters.description: Package name that will be executed

parameters.name: package_parameters
parameters.description: Package parameters of the corresponding package

parameters.name: group_name
parameters.description: Computer group name of which the process will be terminated

parameters.name: distribute_seconds
parameters.description: The number of seconds over which to deploy the action

parameters.name: issue_seconds
parameters.description: The number of seconds to reissue an action from the saved action

parameters.name: expire_seconds
parameters.description: The duration from the start time before the action expires

actions.name: Execute Action
actions.description: Execute an action on the Tanium server

parameters.name: action_name
parameters.description: Creates a name for the action executed

parameters.name: action_group
parameters.description: Group of the action

parameters.name: package_name
parameters.description: Name of the Tanium package to be executed

parameters.name: package_parameters
parameters.description: Parameter inputs of the corresponding package. Provide JSON format (i.e. {"$1": "Standard_Collection", "$2": "SCP"})

parameters.name: group_name
parameters.description: The Tanium Computer Group name on which the action will be executed. If left blank, will execute on all registered IP addresses/hostnames in your Tanium instance

parameters.name: distribute_seconds
parameters.description: The number of seconds over which to deploy the action

parameters.name: issue_seconds
parameters.description: The number of seconds to reissue an action from the saved action

parameters.name: expire_seconds
parameters.description: The duration from the start time before the action expires

actions.name: Run Query
actions.description: Run a search query on the devices registered on the Tanium server

parameters.name: query_text
parameters.description: Query to run (in Tanium Question Syntax)

parameters.name: group_name
parameters.description: The Tanium Computer Group name on which the query will be executed (manual query only)

parameters.name: is_saved_question
parameters.description: Check this box if the query text parameter refers to a 'Saved Question' on your Tanium

parameters.name: timeout_seconds
parameters.description: The number of seconds before the question expires (manual query only)

parameters.name: wait_for_results_processing
parameters.description: Flag to wait for endpoint to return full results

parameters.name: return_when_n_results_available
parameters.description: Return results as soon as 'n' answers are available

parameters.name: wait_for_n_results_available
parameters.description: Wait until 'n' results are present, even if hit the percent complete threshold

actions.name: Get Question Results
actions.description: Return the results for an already asked question

parameters.name: question_id
parameters.description: The ID of the question
